task_completion.description: Verify the simulation basicTimeStep is updated to 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, under the WorldInfo node, the 'basicTimeStep' field should be set to 8.

task_completion.description: Verify an InertialUnit node is added to the WAREHOUSE_AMR robot with the correct name and noise.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree under the WAREHOUSE_AMR robot, an 'InertialUnit' node is present. Its 'name' field is 'inertial_unit' and its 'noise' field is set to 0.0005.

task_completion.description: Verify an Accelerometer node is added to the WAREHOUSE_AMR robot with the correct name and lookupTable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree under the WAREHOUSE_AMR robot, an 'Accelerometer' node is present. Its 'name' field is 'accelerometer' and its 'lookupTable' field contains the values [-100 -100 0.003, 100 100 0.003].

task_completion.description: Verify a Gyro node is added to the WAREHOUSE_AMR robot with the correct name and lookupTable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree under the WAREHOUSE_AMR robot, a 'Gyro' node is present. Its 'name' field is 'gyro' and its 'lookupTable' field contains the values [-34.9 -34.9 0.001, 34.9 34.9 0.001].

task_completion.description: Verify the configured world is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'imu_configured.wbt' is visible on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/), or the Webots window title/save dialog explicitly shows this file path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to configure the robot rather than just writing a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots application open with the scene tree expanded and being interacted with, not just a text editor modifying the .wbt file.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the node properties in Webots.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots field editor or 'Add Node' dialog being used to input the specific values (noise, lookupTable, etc.).

integrity.description: The agent didn't use a terminal script to directly write the .wbt file bypassing the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands like 'echo' or python scripts directly writing the expected output to /home/ga/Desktop/imu_configured.wbt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output path: /home/ga/Desktop/imu_configured.wbt. Target robot: WAREHOUSE_AMR. Expected basicTimeStep: 8. Expected InertialUnit noise: 0.0005. Expected Accelerometer lookupTable bounds: -100 to 100. Expected Gyro lookupTable bounds: -34.9 to 34.9.
